question: How much does Consuelo cost?
reply: The power dialer starts at $20/mo. The CRM is free after your trial. No hidden fees, no per-seat surprises. Most dialers charge $200–300/mo for less.

question: What makes your dialer different?
reply: Multi-line dials, local presence, and spam shield — all for $20/mo. Most dialers charge 10x more for fewer features. Ours is connected to your CRM, coaching, and analytics so everything works together.

question: Do I need a separate CRM?
reply: No. Consuelo includes a CRM that manages itself. Talk to it, tell it what to do. It handles contacts, follow-ups, and pipeline automatically. No more paying for a CRM your team never updates.

question: How does AI coaching work?
reply: On-call whispers give your reps real-time guidance while they're on the phone. Upload your scripts for training. Post-call analytics show what's working and what isn't — so every call gets better.

question: Can I use this with GoHighLevel?
reply: Yes. Consuelo embeds directly inside GHL. Your team never leaves their workflow. We also have a Google Chrome extension and connect to ads platforms straight to your CRM.

question: How does lead disbursement work?
reply: Management disperses leads across the team automatically. Say you have 1,000 leads and 5 reps — each gets their share. AI manages the queue, and automation re-queues old leads that didn't answer within a set period.

question: What about insurance chargebacks?
reply: Post-sale sequences automatically follow up at 1 week, 1 month, and 3 months. Pipeline nourishment keeps leads warm. Better follow-up means fewer chargebacks and higher retention.

question: What integrations do you support?
reply: GoHighLevel (embedded), Google Chrome extension, ads platforms (straight to CRM), and Discord/Slack/Teams via Chat SDK. Everything in the infrastructure is connected so collaboration is never an issue.
